title: CliffTree x Tectonic Compatibility
description: An add-on pack that makes CliffTree compatible with Tectonic
body:
**NOTE:** Starting with Tectonic 3.0, you no longer need this pack if you're using the mod versions of Tectonic and CliffTree together, they are now natively compatible

## CliffTree x Tectonic Compatibility Addon

An add-on for [**Cliff under a Tree (CliffTree)**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) that makes it compatible with [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)'s terrain generation.

## Installation
Requires both **CliffTree** and **Tectonic** datapacks, and this pack should be **loaded above both of them**.
